expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: Several content areas appear horizontally cut off. The top category navigation cuts off the 'Hot Games' tab, and the rightmost game cards in the grids are partially off-screen.
The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows a badge reading '0 Games' while multiple game tiles are displayed below it.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, causing cards near the bottom of the screen to be partially hidden.
Carousel navigation arrows on the hero banner sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow appearing partially clipped.
Some text and logos in the top header are very small, especially the partner/region branding, making them difficult to read on mobile.

expected.reasoning: Issue 1 directly describes the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' badge showing '0 Games' while game tiles are visible below it, matching the expected defect exactly.
